title: The Manoeuvres, Field Firing and Artillery Practice Act, 1938
full_text: The Manoeuvres, Field Firing and Artillery Practice Act, 1938 युद्धाभ्यास और खुले क्षेत्र में गोला चलाने तथा तोप दागने का अभ्यास अधिनियम, 1938 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193805 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 1938-03-12 Act Year: 1938 Short Title: The Manoeuvres, Field Firing and Artillery Practice Act, 1938 Hindi Title: युद्धाभ्यास और खुले क्षेत्र में गोला चलाने तथा तोप दागने का अभ्यास अधिनियम, 1938 Long Title: An Act to provide facilities for military manoeuvres and for field firing and artillery practice. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 12-03-1938 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Manoeuvres, Field Firing and Artillery Practice Act, 1938 CHAPTER I MANOEUVRES CHAPER II FIELD FIRING AND ARTILLERY PRACTICE CHAPTER III GENERAL Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Power of State Government to authorise manoeuvres. Section 3. Powers exercisable for purposes of maneuvers. Section 4. Duty of Officer Commanding to repair damage. Section 5. Right to compensation for damage caused by manoeuvres. Section 6. Method of assessing compensation. Section 7. Offences. Section 8. Definitions. Section 9. Power of State Government to authorise field firing and artillery practice. Section 10. Powers exercisable for purposes of field firing and artillery practice. Section 11. Compensation. Section 12. Offences. Section 13. Power to make rules.
